item.title: New Tool Post to Replace “Quick Change” Holder
item.description: Precision machining calls for reliable tooling. What makes this custom tool post the perfect upgrade over the quick‑change holder?

media:content.media:description: Precision machining calls for reliable tooling. What makes this custom tool post the perfect upgrade over the quick‑change holder?

item.title: Broken Bail Arm Alert | CAT 637 Scraper
item.description: A critical bail arm failure threatens the scraper’s performance. How do we repair and reinforce it to keep this CAT running strong?

item.title: Fixing Our Forklift | Brake Repair & Service
item.description: From worn brakes to smooth stopping power, the forklift gets the service it needs. What steps bring this heavy‑duty machine back to life?

media:content.media:description: From worn brakes to smooth stopping power, the forklift gets the service it needs. What steps bring this heavy‑duty machine back to life?

item.title: Worn Thrust Faces? No Problem. Cylinder Barrel Rebuild
item.description: With welding and machining, worn thrust faces are restored back to spec. How does this rebuild bring the cylinder barrel back to life?

media:content.media:title: Worn Thrust Faces? No Problem. Cylinder Barrel Rebuild
media:content.media:description: With welding and machining, worn thrust faces are restored back to spec. How does this rebuild bring the cylinder barrel back to life?

item.title: We Used the Big Lathe for This Machining Job

item.title: Dialing in the 18‑Tonne Megabore!
item.description: Precision levelling is no small task when the machine weighs 18 tonnes. How do you get this monster Megabore perfectly dialled in and ready for heavy‑duty work?

media:content.media:description: Precision levelling is no small task when the machine weighs 18 tonnes. How do you get this monster Megabore perfectly dialled in and ready for heavy‑duty work?

item.title: Can We Even Fix This?! Cracked Cast Iron Repair
item.description: Cast iron repairs are notoriously tricky. What methods can save a cracked part, and will this repair hold under pressure?

item.title: Machining a Hydraulic Cylinder Head in 60 Seconds
item.description: Precision meets speed as a brand‑new hydraulic cylinder head is machined in record time. What tools and techniques make this process so satisfying to watch?

item.title: Dozer Rebuild: Hydraulic Cylinder Revival
item.description: A worn‑out dozer gets new life with a hydraulic cylinder rebuild. How do machining and welding combine to restore heavy equipment back to full strength?

item.title: Bulldozer Hub Repair in Action
item.description: Watch the process of repairing the final drive hub on a Caterpillar D10T bulldozer, showcasing skill and precision. How will the rebuild hold up?

item.title: CAT 18M Cylinder Rod Weld
item.description: Welding a salvaged ball socket end onto a new cylinder rod for the CAT 18M grader. How does the rotator ensure a clean, consistent weld?

item.title: Carbon Arc Gouging Explained: Precision Metal Cutting
item.description: Kurtis breaks down the process of carbon arc gouging—also known as air arc—the ultimate method for cutting and gouging metal with accuracy. What makes this technique a go‑to for machinists and welders?

media:content.media:title: Carbon Arc Gouging Explained: Precision Metal Cutting
media:content.media:description: Kurtis breaks down the process of carbon arc gouging—also known as air arc—the ultimate method for cutting and gouging metal with accuracy. What makes this technique a go‑to for machinists and welders?

item.title: Custom Boring Bar for Hard‑to‑Reach Gear Face
item.description: A shop‑made boring bar tackles a gear face that’s nearly impossible to reach with standard tooling. What clever machining design makes this precision repair possible?

item.title: Oversized Bushings: Line Boring & Bore Welding
item.description: Oversized bushings call for line boring and bore welding. How does this process ensure a perfect fit?
